mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO device_imu_data ( time, device_id, device_code, accel_x, accel_y, accel_z, gyro_x, gyro_y, gyro_z, sequence, battery_level, motion_type, step_count ) VALUES
( #{item.time}, #{item.deviceId}, #{item.deviceCode}, #{item.accelX}, #{item.accelY}, #{item.accelZ}, #{item.gyroX}, #{item.gyroY}, #{item.gyroZ}, #{item.sequence}, #{item.batteryLevel}, #{item.motionType}, #{item.stepCount} )
mapper.select: SELECT time, device_id, device_code, accel_x, accel_y, accel_z, gyro_x, gyro_y, gyro_z, sequence, battery_level, motion_type, step_count FROM device_imu_data WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT time, device_id, device_code, accel_x, accel_y, accel_z, gyro_x, gyro_y, gyro_z, sequence, battery_level, motion_type, step_count FROM device_imu_data WHERE device_code = #{deviceCode} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
